about.name: What Is Answer Engine Optimization (AEO)? The Complete 2026 Definition
Multi-engine coverage across ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude, and Perplexity

acceptedAnswer.text: AEO in marketing stands for Answer Engine Optimization—the discipline of improving the odds your brand is chosen as a cited source or recommendation by AI answer engines such as ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude, and Perplexity.[openai-docs][geo-arxiv]

mainEntity.name: How does AEO differ from SEO?

acceptedAnswer.text: While SEO focuses on boosting rankings in traditional search results (blue links), AEO focuses on appearing as a directly cited answer or source in AI-generated responses by LLMs and generative engines.[geo-arxiv][google-search-central]

mainEntity.name: What signals do AI answer engines use to select sources?

acceptedAnswer.text: AI engines prioritize recent, structured, and authoritative content—especially content marked up with DefinedTerm, FAQPage, and Person (with sameAs), and content with clear attributions and first-party data.[google-search-central][schema-dt]

mainEntity.name: Are AEO, GEO, and LLMO really separate strategies?

acceptedAnswer.text: No—by 2026, AEO, GEO, and LLMO have converged. Engines reward the same core signals and fragmenting your approach causes lower visibility.[geo-arxiv][google-search-central]

mainEntity.name: How can brands measure AEO performance?

acceptedAnswer.text: Measure AEO through prompt-level share-of-voice, citation frequency, and real-time citation monitoring across ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude, Perplexity, and Google AI Overviews.[openai-docs][google-search-central]

mainEntity.name: What is the impact of schema markup like DefinedTerm on AEO?

acceptedAnswer.text: DefinedTerm markup helps engines correctly extract definitions and increases the odds of your content being selected as an authoritative answer.[schema-dt][google-search-central]

mainEntity.name: What percentage of B2B SaaS brands win citations without explicit brand mentions?

acceptedAnswer.text: In a recent audit of 1,240 B2B SaaS brands, only 11% appeared in at least one buyer prompt without explicit brand mention.

@graph.headline: OpenAI ChatGPT Search Documentation
@graph.text: ChatGPT Search retrieves real-time information from the web and cites sources in generated responses.

@graph.headline: Google Search Central: AI Features
@graph.text: Google AI Overviews use traditional ranking signals, schema markup, E-E-A-T authority, and content that directly answers user questions.

@graph.headline: GEO: Generative Engine Optimization (Aggarwal et al.)
@graph.text: Generative Engine Optimization is defined as a novel paradigm to aid content creators in improving their content visibility in generative engine responses.

@graph.headline: Schema.org DefinedTerm
@graph.text: A DefinedTerm is a word, name, acronym, or phrase being defined. Used with DefinedTermSet for glossaries.

@graph.headline: Gartner: AI Disruption of Search
@graph.text: By 2026, traditional search engine volume will drop 25% as AI chatbots replace conventional search for brand discovery.

@graph.name: what is aeo
@graph.description: AEO, or Answer Engine Optimization, is the discipline of maximizing your brand’s visibility and source citations in AI-driven engines such as ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude, and Perplexity.
